case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. ALVARO GONZALEZ JR

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ JR, ALVARO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-01-2014

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ JR, ALVARO $6,755.99 PRINCIPAL, $293.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,048.99, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED OCT-13-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ JR, ALVARO

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR OCT-20-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT GONZALEZ JR, ALVARO
